testcase.name: runScenario
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //h1[contains(text(),'Download WordPress')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.119, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\mahes\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63420}, goog:processID: 19444, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63420/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.119, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 5142786812846023383a6d9145cbbe44 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.DownloadPage.isDownloadPageDisplayed(DownloadPage.java:23) at stepdefinitions.WordPressSteps.verify_download_page(WordPressSteps.java:36) at ✽.Verify Download page is displayed(file:///C:/Users/mahes/eclipse-workspace/CapstoneProject_5/src/test/resources/features/wordpress.feature:6)

testcase.name: runScenario
